name: Nuode Investment Co.,Ltd
summary: Nuode Investment Co.,Ltd engages in the production and sale of lithium-ion battery materials and electrolytic copper foils in China. It also offers power battery materials. The company was formerly known as HINA-KINWA HIGH TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD. and changed its name to Nuode Investment Co.,Ltd in February 2016. Nuode Investment Co.,Ltd was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
